Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 24th, 2009 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
June 24th, 2009 (IMAX) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: June 24th, 2009 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: October 20th, 2009 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense sequences of sci-fi action violence, language, some crude and sexual material, and brief drug material.
Running Time: 149 minutes
Franchise: Transformers
Film format: IMAX: DMR
Filming location (city or town): Al-Salt Jordan, Alamogordo, NM, Bethlehem, PA, Long Beach, CA, Paris, France, Philadelphia, PA, Playa Vista, CA, Princeton, NJ, Tucson, AZ
